name: CONTRACT-BUG-40
title: Post-consolidation cleanup: fix stale test-bug-fixes-cycle.py path, update Inv 36 schema reference, add retirement semantics, update workspace-structure.json for retired features
description:
Post-consolidation audit findings for contract feature:

1. test-bug-fixes-cycle.py:164 RABBIT_PRINT_PRODUCERS list still includes .claude/features/tdd-subagent/scripts/tdd-step.py — file was moved to tdd-state-machine. Test currently fails.
2. Inv 36 prose references 'rabbit-print.schema.json producers array' but the schema no longer has that array. Either restore schema source-of-truth or rewrite Inv 36.
3. Add tdd-state-machine to Inv 38 parenthetical (currently only mentions Cycle B additions).
4. Add an invariant covering rabbit-feature-spec skill rename (deployment source/destination locked).
5. Add retirement semantics: define what 'status: retired' means in feature.json; validate-feature.py must short-circuit on retired features. Add 'status' field to feature.json.schema.json with enum [active, retired].
6. workspace-structure.json: mark rabbit-feature-scope and rabbit-spec as retired (not required), add tdd-state-machine as required. Add retirement marker to the schema if needed.
